system_description: latent state space transformation and inference synthesis

primary_corpus: obsidian vault in full: scanned novels and personal notes, all in Markdown
each note also contains semantic frontmatter

corpus_nodes: semantic chunks broken down by Markdown structure section ordinals
semantic chunks embedded with metadata reference to whole note frontmatter, note section ordinal, and note file structure topology
vectors to be indexed and stored for vector search surface
semantic chunks to be indexed and stored for lexical search surface
lexical and vector search surfaces combined for hybrid search

graph_layer: unsure exactly what the ontology of this would look like but likely a good surface to incorporate

flow: state_kernel or recurrent_state + user_input → state_perturbation (state_kernel or recurrent_state + user_input hydration = latent_space_traversal + latent_space_transformation) = recurrent_state

user_input.semantic_context_extraction: surface and extract semantics and context for perturbation process
user_input.coverage_benchmark: semantic_context_extraction gets light hydration with recurrent_state to produce a benchmark metric (the state_perturbation should/could aim to achieve?)

state_kernel: kernel_context_packet to jump start the conversation frame
state_perturbation: = state_kernel or recurrent_state + user_input hydration = latent_space_traversal +/or latent_space_transformation

latent_space_traversal.semantic_node_activation: in all data formats: primary_corpus, corpus_nodes, synthetic_nodes, graph_layer
latent_space_traversal.degrees_of_freedom: user_input, semantic_context_extraction and recurrent_state project degrees of freedom from semantic_node_activation for state_perturbation
latent_space_traversal.neighbor_identification: possible data candidates within contextual semantics
latent_space_traversal.coverage_benchmark: determine how much retrieval is required from semantic_node_activation and neighbor_identification within degrees_of_freedom to satisfy coverage_benchmark - possibly avoid looping behavior with this
latent_space_traversal.semantic_traversal_manifest: produce manifest of latent_space_traversal candidates based on semantic_node_activation, neighbor_identification, degrees_of_freedom once coverage_benchmark satisfied

latent_space_transformation.llm_synthesis: structured output API response call to synthesize retrieval
